title: Characterization of aliA and aliB deletion mutants reveals a dominant role of AliA in Haloferax volcanii lipoprotein lipidation
author: Garcia, Andy
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset includes the custom Python pipelines used for proteomics data filtering and figure generation, as well as raw and processed qPCR data, accompanying the manuscript submission "Characterization of  aliA  and  aliB  deletion mutants reveals a dominant role of AliA in  Haloferax volcanii  lipoprotein lipidation". This dataset can be used to reproduce the results described in the manuscript.
steps_raw: This dataset includes the custom Python pipelines used for proteomics data filtering and figure generation, as well as raw and processed qPCR data, accompanying the manuscript submission "Characterization of  aliA  and  aliB  deletion mutants reveals a dominant role of AliA in  Haloferax volcanii  lipoprotein lipidation". This dataset can be used to reproduce the results described in the manuscript.
